ValidationRule.description: Prevents users from editing fields on the Quote if it is not in Draft status, unless they are approving or rejecting it.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Draft")), NOT(ISCHANGED(Status__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Margin_Amount__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Total_Amount__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Total_Cost__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Phase_List__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Quotes can only be edited when they are in Draft status.
